articles.title: 'He prioritised money but did not get the happiness' - Sadagoppan Ramesh’s intriguing take on Pant-Kuldeep trade for IPL 2027
articles.description: Sadagoppan Ramesh opined that Rishabh Pant entered the last mega-auction looking for a lucrative deal. The former added that despite becoming the highest-paid player, he didn't find happiness at LSG.

articles.title: 'Something we’ve never seen before' - Jos Buttler showers huge praise on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
articles.description: Sooryavanshi made history by smashing an 11-ball half-century, the fastest fifty in List A history, in a knock which saw him score 94 in just 28 balls.
